metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for LLM observability, API exploration, and Python development workflows

plugins.name: langfuse
plugins.description: General-purpose Langfuse integration — data exploration, dashboard/widget management, prompt versioning, dataset/experiment management, and more via conversational interface

plugins.name: openapi-tools
plugins.description: Skills for listing and inspecting OpenAPI endpoints on running services (FastAPI, etc.)

plugins.name: python-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Python development workflow — pytest test execution & review agents, conventional commits, PR creation, branch management, unit testing guide, and task management with background agent orchestration
